subcodes.first_line: O thou daughter of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received. Its content was a proof of the promotion of the Light of Guidance
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه شما رسید مضمون دلیل بر انتشار نور هدی بود و طلوع صبح ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers
